examples: The boys are planning to decorate when they get the time.
When they came to decorate the rear bedroom, it was Jemma who had the final say.
My mom and I would decorate it.
Sumptuous friezes and inscriptions cursing anyone tampering the grave decorate many sarcophagi found in the outgrowth.
And there are legions of poor people who will paint and decorate for low wages.
